message.content:
Edit the file /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/rbw/rbf_Foundry.sh

Task: Add `--connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"` to all 12 curl invocations in this file.

The curl sites are around these lines: 352, 536, 584, 607, 648, 681, 846, 869, 1311, 1334, 1383, 1409.

For each curl invocation, add two new continuation lines for the timeout flags, right after the `-s` or `-sS` flag, matching the existing indentation style of each curl block. For example if a curl looks like:
```
  curl -s                                                \
      -X DELETE                                          \
```
Change to:
```
  curl -s                                                \
      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"             \
      -X DELETE                                          \
```

Read the file first. Make exactly 12 edits — one per curl invocation. Do not change anything else (do not change -s to -sS in this file).

content.text: I'll read the file first to understand the structure of each curl invocation.

content.content:
345→    case "${z_status}" in PENDING|QUEUED|WORKING) : ;; *) break;; esac
   346→    sleep 5
   347→
   348→    z_attempts=$((z_attempts + 1))
   349→    test ${z_attempts} -le ${z_max_attempts} || buc_die "Build timeout after ${z_max_attempts} attempts"
   350→
   351→    buc_log_args "Fetch build status (attempt ${z_attempts}/${z_max_attempts})"
   352→    curl -s                                                \
   353→         -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \

   355→         > "${ZRBF_BUILD_STATUS_FILE}"                     \
   356→      || buc_die "Failed to get build status"
   357→

   359→    test -s "${ZRBF_BUILD_STATUS_FILE}" || buc_die "Build status file is empty"
   360→
   361→    jq -r '.status' "${ZRBF_BUILD_STATUS_FILE}" > "${ZRBF_STATUS_CHECK_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to extract status"
   362→    z_status=$(<"${ZRBF_STATUS_CHECK_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to read status"
   363→    test -n "${z_status}" || buc_die "Status is empty"

530→  buc_step "Deleting: ${z_locator}"
   531→
   532→  # Delete by tag reference
   533→  local z_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}status.txt"
   534→  local z_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}response.json"
   535→
   536→  curl -X DELETE -s                                   \

   542→

   547→  if test "${z_http_code}" != "202" && test "${z_http_code}" != "204"; then
   548→    buc_warn "Response body: $(cat "${z_response_file}" 2>/dev/null || echo 'empty')"

578→  buc_step "Listing all images in repository"
   579→
   580→  local z_packages_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbf_list_packages.json"
   581→  local z_gar_api="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com/v1"

   612→    # Skip if error response

   614→      continue
   615→    fi

   641→

838→  local z_about_tag="${z_consecration}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}"
   839→
   840→  buc_step "Verifying ark existence"
   841→
   842→  # Check if -image artifact exists
   843→  local z_image_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}summon_image_status.txt"
   844→  local z_image_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}summon_image_response.json"
   845→

   848→    -H "Accept: ${ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \

   853→
   854→  local z_image_http_code
   855→  z_image_http_code=$(<"${z_image_status_file}")
   856→  test -n "${z_image_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -image"
   857→
   858→  local z_image_exists=false
   859→  if test "${z_image_http_code}" = "200"; then
   860→    z_image_exists=true
   861→  elif test "${z_image_http_code}" != "404"; then
   862→    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_image_http_code} when checking -image artifact"
   863→  fi
   864→
   865→  # Check if -about artifact exists
   866→  local z_about_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}summon_about_status.txt"

   868→
   869→  curl --head -s                                     \

   872→    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
   873→    -o "${z_about_response_file}"                   \
   874→    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \

   880→
   881→  local z_about_exists=false

   883→    z_about_exists=true
   884→  elif test "${z_about_http_code}" != "404"; then

   886→  fi
   887→
   888→  # Evaluate ark state

   891→  fi

1303→  local z_about_tag="${z_consecration}${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}"
  1304→
  1305→  buc_step "Verifying ark existence"
  1306→
  1307→  # Check if -image artifact exists
  1308→  local z_image_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}image_status.txt"
  1309→  local z_image_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}image_response.json"
  1310→
  1311→  curl --head -s                                     \
  1312→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
  1313→    -H "Accept: ${ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
  1314→    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
  1315→    -o "${z_image_response_file}"                   \
  1316→    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_image_tag}" \

  1318→

  1320→  z_image_http_code=$(<"${z_image_status_file}")
  1321→  test -n "${z_image_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -image"
  1322→
  1323→  local z_image_exists=false
  1324→  if test "${z_image_http_code}" = "200"; then
  1325→    z_image_exists=true
  1326→  elif test "${z_image_http_code}" != "404"; then
  1327→    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_image_http_code} when checking -image artifact"
  1328→  fi
  1329→
  1330→  # Check if -about artifact exists
  1331→  local z_about_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}about_status.txt"
  1332→  local z_about_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}about_response.json"
  1333→
  1334→  curl --head -s                                     \
  1335→    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
  1336→    -H "Accept: ${ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
  1337→    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
  1338→    -o "${z_about_response_file}"                   \
  1339→    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \
  1340→    > "${z_about_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -about artifact"
  1341→
  1342→  local z_about_http_code
  1343→  z_about_http_code=$(<"${z_about_status_file}")
  1344→  test -n "${z_about_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -about"
  1345→
  1346→  local z_about_exists=false
  1347→  if test "${z_about_http_code}" = "200"; then
  1348→    z_about_exists=true
  1349→  elif test "${z_about_http_code}" != "404"; then
  1350→    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_about_http_code} when checking -about artifact"
  1351→  fi
  1352→
  1353→  # Evaluate ark state
  1354→  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "false" && test "${z_about_exists}" = "false"; then
  1355→    buc_die "Ark not found: neither -image nor -about exists"
  1356→  fi
  1357→
  1358→  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true" && test "${z_about_exists}" = "false"; then
  1359→    buc_warn "Orphaned artifact detected: -image exists but -about is missing"
  1360→  elif test "${z_image_exists}" = "false" && test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1361→    buc_warn "Orphaned artifact detected: -about exists but -image is missing"
  1362→  fi
  1363→
  1364→  # Confirm abjuration unless --force
  1365→  if test "${z_skip_confirm}" = "false"; then
  1366→    local z_confirm_msg="Will abjure ark ${z_vessel}/${z_consecration}:"
  1367→    if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true"; then
  1368→      z_confirm_msg="${z_confirm_msg}\n  - ${z_vessel}:${z_image_tag}"
  1369→    fi
  1370→    if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1371→      z_confirm_msg="${z_confirm_msg}\n  - ${z_vessel}:${z_about_tag}"
  1372→    fi
  1373→    buc_require "${z_confirm_msg}" "yes"
  1374→  fi
  1375→
  1376→  # Delete -image artifact if exists
  1377→  if test "${z_image_exists}" = "true"; then
  1378→    buc_step "Deleting -image artifact"
  1379→
  1380→    local z_delete_image_status="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_image_status.txt"
  1381→    local z_delete_image_response="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_image_response.json"
  1382→
  1383→    curl -X DELETE -s                                   \
  1384→      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"             \
  1385→      -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
  1386→      -o "${z_delete_image_response}"                   \
  1387→      "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_image_tag}" \
  1388→      > "${z_delete_image_status}" || buc_die "DELETE request failed for -image"
  1389→
  1390→    local z_delete_image_code
  1391→    z_delete_image_code=$(<"${z_delete_image_status}")
  1392→    test -n "${z_delete_image_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -image delete"
  1393→
  1394→    if test "${z_delete_image_code}" != "202" && test "${z_delete_image_code}" != "204"; then
  1395→      buc_warn "Response body: $(cat "${z_delete_image_response}" 2>/dev/null || echo 'empty')"
  1396→      buc_die "Failed to delete -image artifact (HTTP ${z_delete_image_code})"
  1397→    fi
  1398→
  1399→    buc_info "Deleted: ${z_vessel}:${z_image_tag}"
  1400→  fi
  1401→
  1402→  # Delete -about artifact if exists
  1403→  if test "${z_about_exists}" = "true"; then
  1404→    buc_step "Deleting -about artifact"
  1405→
  1406→    local z_delete_about_status="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_about_status.txt"
  1407→    local z_delete_about_response="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}delete_about_response.json"
  1408→
  1409→    curl -X DELETE -s                                   \

  1411→      -w "%{http_code}"                                 \
  1412→      -o "${z_delete_about_response}"                   \
  1413→      "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \

  1416→    local z_delete_about_code

  1418→    test -n "${z_delete_about_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -about delete"
  1419→
  1420→    if test "${z_delete_about_code}" != "202" && test "${z_delete_about_code}" != "204"; then
  1421→      buc_warn "Response body: $(cat "${z_delete_about_response}" 2>/dev/null || echo 'empty')"
  1422→      buc_die "Failed to delete -about artifact (HTTP ${z_delete_about_code})"

    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
    -H "Accept: ${ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
    -o "${z_image_response_file}"                   \
    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_image_tag}" \
    > "${z_image_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -image artifact"

  local z_image_http_code
  z_image_http_code=$(<"${z_image_status_file}")
  test -n "${z_image_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for -image"

  local z_image_exists=false
  if test "${z_image_http_code}" = "200"; then
    z_image_exists=true
  elif test "${z_image_http_code}" != "404"; then
    buc_die "Unexpected HTTP status ${z_image_http_code} when checking -image artifact"
  fi

  # Check if -about artifact exists
  local z_about_status_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}summon_about_status.txt"
  local z_about_response_file="${ZRBF_DELETE_PREFIX}summon_about_response.json"

  curl --head -s                                     \
    -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}"           \
    -H "Accept: ${ZRBF_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}"     \
    -w "%{http_code}"                               \
    -o "${z_about_response_file}"                   \
    "${ZRBF_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_vessel}/manifests/${z_about_tag}" \
    > "${z_about_status_file}" || buc_die "HEAD request failed for -about artifact"
